title: Elimination of categories if something is selected in form
excerpt:
After creating a board, appropriate items and a form: 
Clicking the link to the form to complete. If a label selection is chosen, it eliminates other select options on the form or creates new options based on the selecti…

posts.author: corjlsoftware (Corjl)
posts.cookedHtml:
After creating a board, appropriate items and a form:

Clicking the link to the form to complete. If a label selection is chosen, it eliminates other select options on the form or creates new options based on the selection

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @corjlsoftware! Are you referring to conditional questions here?

  • Check out the create conditional questions section of this article: https://support.monday.com/hc/en-us/articles/360000358700-monday-WorkForms

Essentially this works the way you’ve described - if a label is selected it will create a new question based on the selected value.

Let me know if I am understanding your request correctly!

posts.author: corjlsoftware (Corjl)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Bianca,

Yes! This is what I was looking for Thank you so much!
